title: spergularia marina subsp. rupestris
intro: Spergularia marina subsp. rupestris, also known as sea sandwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Spergularia marina subsp. rupestris are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Spergularia marina subsp. rupestris include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
